analysis.summary: Moderate risk detected. Several buyer-confidence gaps may reduce conversion.

findings.evidenceSnippet: and clothing made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FREE shipping & returns. Men's Shoes Customer Favorites Apparel & Accessories Socks Men's Apparel Accessories Final Few Women's Shoes Popular Picks Apparel & Accessories Socks Apparel A
findings.whyItMatters: Cross-border buyers may drop off if they cannot tell whether the store serves their country.
findings.recommendedFix: State which countries are supported and whether international shipping is available.

findings.evidenceSnippet: and clothing made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FREE shipping & returns. Men's Shoes Customer Favorites Apparel & Accessories Socks Men's Apparel Accessories Final Few Women's Shoes Popular Picks Apparel & Accessories Socks Apparel A
findings.whyItMatters: Buyers often hesitate when arrival timing is not visible.
findings.recommendedFix: Add estimated delivery windows and tracking expectations.

findings.evidenceSnippet: Allbirds: Comfortable, Sustainable Shoes & Apparel Allbirds: The world’s most comfortable shoes, flats, and clothing made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FR
findings.whyItMatters: Surprise fees can stop international buyers at checkout.
findings.recommendedFix: Explain whether duties, taxes, or import fees may apply and who pays them.

findings.evidenceSnippet: ng made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FREE shipping & returns. Men's Shoes Customer Favorites Apparel & Accessories Socks Men's Apparel Accessories Final Few Women's Shoes Popular Picks Apparel & Accessories Socks Apparel Allbirds: Co
findings.whyItMatters: If return shipping responsibility is unclear, buyers may avoid the purchase.
findings.recommendedFix: State who pays for return shipping and which cases qualify for a return.

findings.evidenceSnippet: ng made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FREE shipping & returns. Men's Shoes Customer Favorites Apparel & Accessories Socks Men's Apparel Accessories Final Few Women's Shoes Popular Picks Apparel & Accessories Socks Apparel Allbirds: Co
findings.whyItMatters: Cross-border buyers want to know whether the store is set up for their location.
findings.recommendedFix: Add a section that explains whether international returns are supported.

findings.evidenceSnippet: Allbirds: Comfortable, Sustainable Shoes & Apparel Allbirds: The world’s most comfortable shoes, flats, and clothing made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FR
findings.whyItMatters: Social proof lowers perceived risk and increases confidence.
findings.recommendedFix: Add reviews, testimonials, or press mentions near the main CTA.

findings.evidenceSnippet: Allbirds: Comfortable, Sustainable Shoes & Apparel Allbirds: The world’s most comfortable shoes, flats, and clothing made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FR
findings.whyItMatters: Buyers leave pages when obvious objections are not answered.
findings.recommendedFix: Add a visible FAQ section with the top buyer objections.

findings.whyItMatters: Buyers want to inspect policies before paying.
findings.recommendedFix: Show policy links in the header, footer, or checkout-adjacent area.

findings.evidenceSnippet: Allbirds: Comfortable, Sustainable Shoes & Apparel Allbirds: The world’s most comfortable shoes, flats, and clothing made with natural materials like merino wool and eucalyptus. FR
findings.whyItMatters: Even a small payment concern can stop a checkout.
findings.recommendedFix: Add accepted payment methods and a short secure checkout reassurance.
